< Home >

Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.FederatedLoginProvider

Represents a federated login provider for the site.

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
Id

The id of the federated login provider.

 integer

None.
Name

The name of the federated login provider.

 string

None.
IconUrl

The icon url for the federated login provider.

 string

None.
OpenInExternalBrowser

Flag which is set to true if federated login provider page should be opened in external browser and in particular it cannot be opened in a webview control.

 boolean

None.
ButtonText

The text to show in the button to login using this particular federated login type.

 string

None.
LogoutType

Logout types in itslearning. Will specify if user should be logged out from itslearning and/or from federated login provider.

 Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.LogoutType

None.
